  "claims": [
    "The Fire Integrated Real-Time Intelligence System (FIRIS) utilizes military grade equipment and technology to respond to and fight wildfires.",
    "The FIRIS system has been successfully deployed in Orange County by the Orange County Fire Authority (OCFA).",
